title: Eggless custom cakes in Riverstone for Schofields and Marsden Park families
summary:
Marsden Park and Schofields have grown fast. The specialist bakeries haven't.

Num Nums is at Riverstone Shopping Centre — 100% eggless, fully custom, 15 flavours, any design. No eggs in any product, no exceptions. Not a dietary option — the entire bakery.

Sizes from 6-inch ($39.99, serves 6-8) up to 16-inch for large gatherings. Free parking at the centre. Minimum 48-hour notice required — that's what fresh baking actually takes.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: Schofields Marsden Park North West Sydney bakery
can't find eggless custom cake near Marsden Park
